source_pr.title: executor: fix logging format of prepared statements (#16062)
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #16062

Problem Summary: With a slow prepared statement, the slow query log records it in the form of `exec ...` rather than the underlying SQL with placeholders. 

### What is changed and how it works?

What's Changed: Records original queries of prepared statements.

How it Works:

On master branch (53a68b56da072c6b9863ce38b4488ede618cfd49)

```
mysql> PREPARE mystmt FROM 'SELECT SLEEP(?)';
Query OK, 0 rows affected (0.00 sec)

mysql> SET @num = 1;
Query OK, 0 rows affected (0.00 sec)

mysql> EXECUTE mystmt USING @num;
+----------+
| SLEEP(?) |
+----------+
|        0 |
+----------+
1 row in set (1.00 sec)

mysql> SELECT Query FROM information_schema.SLOW_QUERY LIMIT 1;
+-------------------------------------------+
| Query                                     |
+-------------------------------------------+
| EXECUTE mystmt USING @num [arguments: 1]; |
+-------------------------------------------+
1 row in set (0.00 sec)
```

On PR branch

```
mysql> PREPARE mystmt FROM 'SELECT SLEEP(?)';
Query OK, 0 rows affected (0.00 sec)

mysql> SET @num = 1;
Query OK, 0 rows affected (0.00 sec)

mysql> EXECUTE mystmt USING @num;
+----------+
| SLEEP(?) |
+----------+
|        0 |
+----------+
1 row in set (1.00 sec)

mysql> SELECT Query FROM information_schema.SLOW_QUERY LIMIT 1;
+---------------------------------+
| Query                           |
+---------------------------------+
| SELECT SLEEP(?) [arguments: 1]; |
+---------------------------------+
1 row in set (0.00 sec)
```

### Related changes

N/A

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Integration test

Side effects

- Breaking backward compatibility

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- Slow query log records original queries with placeholders for prepared statements.

symptoms: "where query like '%/* TestSlowQueryLog: prepared */%' order by time desc limit 1"). (executor/executor_test.go)
failure_signature: "where query like '%/* TestSlowQueryLog: prepared */%' order by time desc limit 1"). (executor/executor_test.go)
fix_pattern: "where query like '%/* TestSlowQueryLog: prepared */%' order by time desc limit 1"). (executor/executor_test.go)

evidence: evidence: "where query like '%/* TestSlowQueryLog: prepared */%' order by time desc limit 1"). (executor/executor_test.go)
